_meta.source: Editorial team annotations cross-referenced to global news events
_meta.units: event markers tied to quarterly tariff timeline
_meta.notes: Each event explains a visible move in the SG household tariff

events.label: Global LNG squeeze begins
events.detail: Asia LNG spot prices triple as post-COVID demand rebounds.

events.label: Russia–Ukraine gas crunch
events.detail: European buyers outbid Asian utilities for LNG; SG tariff peaks above 30¢/kWh.

events.label: GST step-up to 8%
events.detail: Headline tariff rises with the GST adjustment; underlying fuel cost easing.

events.label: GST step-up to 9%
events.detail: Second GST adjustment; carbon tax also rises from S$5 to S$25.

events.label: Markets stabilise
events.detail: LNG spot prices ease as new export capacity comes online.

events.label: Carbon tax to S$45
events.detail: Carbon tax steps up from S$25 to S$45 per tonne CO₂-equivalent.

events.label: Hormuz disruption
events.detail: EMA flags that some LNG shipments affected by Middle East conflict; tariff edges up.
